account.title: Account
account.documentsIntro: Upload personal documents such as ID copies, certifications, or other records.
account.payStubsSubtitle: View and download your pay stubs
account.taxDocumentsSubtitle: View and download your W-2s, 1099s, and other tax documents
account.kioskPinHint: Set a 4-8 digit PIN for kiosk/shop floor authentication.
account.colorThemeHint: Choose between light and dark mode.
account.fontScaleHint: Adjust the text size across the application. Changes take effect immediately.
account.taxFormsIntro: Complete the following forms to finish your onboarding. Click any form to review the document and sign digitally.
account.downloadFormInstruction: Download the form, complete it, then return here to acknowledge completion.
account.digitalSigningStart: Click below to start the digital signing process.
account.fillAndSignReady: Your form has been prepared. Please review and sign below.
account.formReadyToSign: Form prepared. Please sign in the panel below.
account.signedDocAvailable: Your signed document is available for download.
account.formPendingSetup: This form is being configured by your administrator. You will be able to fill it out electronically once setup is complete.
account.acknowledgmentInstruction: Review the form above, then click below to confirm you have read and completed it.
account.identityDocsInstruction: Upload identity documents to verify your eligibility to work in the United States.
account.identityDocRequired: Upload either one List A document, or one List B document AND one List C document.
account.identityDocNeedListC: A List C document (work authorization) is also required alongside your List B document.
account.identityDocNeedListB: A List B document (identity) is also required alongside your List C document.
account.docListATitle: Establishes both identity and employment authorization
account.docListADesc: Upload ONE document: U.S. Passport, Permanent Resident Card (Form I-551), Employment Authorization Document (Form I-766), or a Foreign Passport with Form I-551 stamp.
account.docListBDesc: Upload ONE document: Driver's license, State ID card, School ID with photo, Voter registration card, or U.S. Military card.
account.docListCDesc: Upload ONE document: Social Security card (unrestricted), Birth certificate, or Certificate of U.S. Citizenship/Naturalization.
account.docTypeCitizenshipCert: Certificate of U.S. Citizenship or Naturalization
account.formAlreadySubmitted: This form has already been submitted
account.formSensitiveNote: For security, previously submitted data is not displayed. You can submit a new version if your information has changed.
account.formCompletedNote: This form was completed successfully. You can submit a new version if your information has changed.

rfid.relayNotInstalled: RFID relay service is not installed on this computer.
rfid.clientSetupDesc: Each workstation with an RFID/NFC reader needs the relay service installed. Download the setup script and run it as Administrator on the client machine — it handles everything automatically.
rfid.setupScriptHint: Right-click the downloaded file → Run with PowerShell (as Administrator). The script installs Node.js if needed, downloads the relay, and registers it as a Windows Service.
rfid.setupScriptDownloaded: Setup script downloaded. Run it as Administrator on the client machine.
rfid.setupScriptError: Could not download the setup script. Try again or contact your system administrator.
